name: PRAZMA CANON
description: An E-tech Bandit launcher that fires three spiraling purple rounds in a high arc, with each main shot shedding smaller projectiles along the way. That gives it strong area coverage against large targets and clustered enemies, especially when the rounds stay in the air long enough to release more submunitions. It consumes 2 launcher ammo per trigger pull despite throwing out a full three-shot volley.
notes: The splitting trail makes it especially strong against large targets and clustered mobs at range, where more submunitions have time to spawn. Its splash radius is smaller than many other E-tech launchers, which makes it a little safer to use up close when you want all three main rounds to land on one enemy. You can also fire it straight up to carpet a wide area, though the falling blasts can strip your shields quickly if you are careless.
